spending a day exploring the charming hilly town of #sintra #portugal ✨🏡🏘️🪴🎨✨ 

📍central square of São Martinho is a charming historic town centre with pastel colored building, Sintra Palace a UNESCO world heritage site best-preserved medieval royal residence in Portugal & love the hand painted ceramic crafts @visitportugal
